For order on CMA No. 2489/2025 (Urgent) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-1528 of 2019 1. For order on CMA No. 2493/2025 (Urgent) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-1529 of 2019 1. For order on CMA No. 2498/2025 (Urgent) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-1530 of 2019 1. For order on CMA No. 2506/2025 (Urgent) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-1970 of 2019 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13-02-2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the Petitioners submits that he will not press these petitions and the Petitioners shall seek appropriate remedy before the forum concerned. In view hereof these petitions are dismissed as withdrawn. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad PS
